sections.paragraph:
γαλεάγρα, ας, ἡ (Hyperid., Fgm. 34; Theophr., HP 5, 7, 6; Ezk 19:9; TestJob 27:1; AscIs 3:6) prim.: device for catching a weasel ‘weasel-trap’ or ‘weasel-cage’ then gener. animal-cage AcPl Ha 4, 22.—DELG s.v. γαλέη.

Hyperid Hyperid , IV b.c.—List 5

Fgm. Fgm. = fragment, fragmentary

Theophr Theophr , IV–III b.c.—List 5

TestJob TestJob = Testament of Job—List 2

AscIs AscIs = Ascension of Isaiah—List 2

prim. prim. = primarily

gener. gener. = generally

AcPl Ha AcPl Ha = Acts of Paul, PHamb—List 1

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 187
